code:
import io
import string
import list

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut tokens: List<Int> = []
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    -1
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      let v = match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(current)
  let v = match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
end

mut output = ""
mut first = true
mut idx = 0
let total = tokens.len()
while idx < total
  let val = match tokens.get(idx)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if first
    output = "#{val}"
    first = false
  else
    output = "#{output} #{val}"
  end
  idx = idx + 2
end
println(output)
